Package com.semanticwww.yesir.gateway

Interface Summary
GatewayExporter A gateway exporter knows how to export forum messages to an external data source.
GatewayImporter A gateway importer knows how to import forum data from an external data source.
 

Class Summary
Attachment  
DateSorter sort on date
DefaultGatewayExporter  
DefaultGatewayImporter  
Gateway  
GatewayManager Manages gateways for a forum, which synchronize the forum with external data sources such as an NNTP newsgroup or email account.
Meme meme - An element of culture that may be considered to be passed on by non-genetic means，esp.imitation.
SetupDlg Title: Description: Common GUI setup dialog for importer/exporter Copyright: Copyright (c) 2003 Company:
 

Exception Summary
GatewayException Thrown when an error occurs during a Gateway operation.
